title: A few Christmas snaps
summary: With few boats there are just nine of us for Christmas lunch. Tiny little fishing boats bring in the goodies. We bring our own wine to the resort and are not charged any corkage. An American with his Chinese family amazes us with his bi-lingual 26 month old daughter...
content: With few boats there are just nine of us for Christmas lunch.  Tiny little fishing boats bring in the goodies.  We bring our own wine to the resort and are not charged any corkage. An American with his Chinese family amazes us with his bi-lingual 26 month old daughter...
